task_completion.description: Create a new GeoPackage LineString layer named 'power_line' with CRS EPSG:4326.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New GeoPackage Layer' dialog is visible with Database path set to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/power_line.gpkg', Table name 'power_line', Geometry type 'LineString', and CRS 'EPSG:4326'. Alternatively, the 'power_line' layer is visible in the Layers panel with a line geometry icon.

task_completion.description: Enable snapping to ensure exact connectivity to the vertices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Snapping Toolbar is visible and the 'Enable Snapping' magnet icon is toggled ON (highlighted/depressed). A snapping indicator (usually a pink square or crosshair) may also be visible on the map canvas when hovering near a point.

task_completion.description: Digitize the route starting from Point A to Point B.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line segment is actively being drawn or is completed between the bottom-left point (Point A) and the top-middle point (Point B) on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Continue digitizing the route from Point B to Point C.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line segment continues from the top-middle point (Point B) to the rightmost point (Point C), forming a connected two-segment line. The feature creation dialog might be visible to finalize the LineString.

task_completion.description: Save the layer edits for the 'power_line' layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save Layer Edits' button (floppy disk with a pencil) is clicked, or the 'Toggle Editing' pencil icon is turned off and a prompt to save the edits is accepted.
The 'Save Project' dialog is visible, the save icon on the project toolbar is clicked, or the main QGIS window title bar shows a saved project name instead of 'Untitled Project'.

integrity.description: The agent used the QGIS GUI to create the layer and digitize the route.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, dialogs, and the map canvas rather than terminal windows executing spatial commands (like ogr2ogr).

integrity.description: The agent manually digitized the line on the map canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of the digitizing crosshairs, rubber-band line during drawing, or snapping tooltips on the map canvas.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script to bypass manual digitization.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS Python console is either closed or does not contain a script that programmatically creates the 'power_line' layer and its geometry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Output GeoPackage path: /home/ga/GIS_Data/power_line.gpkg. Layer name: 'power_line'. Geometry: LineString. CRS: EPSG:4326. The route must connect three points in order: Point A [-122.4, 37.6] (bottom-left), Point B [-122.3, 37.7] (top-middle), and Point C [-122.1, 37.65] (rightmost). Snapping must be enabled to ensure exact vertex connectivity.
